metadata.title: Hailuo AI Video Generator - Next Gen Text to Video
metadata.description: Create Hailuo AI videos from text prompts or images. Control motion style, duration, aspect ratio, and prompts for product, ad, and creator clips.
metadata.imageAlt: Hailuo AI Video Generator - Cheapest Access

workspace.title: Hailuo AI Video Generator
workspace.description: Create short-form video concepts from text or image direction with clear subject motion, camera language, atmosphere, and social pacing.
workspace.defaultPrompt: Create a high-energy Hailuo AI video: a fashion model walks through a rainy neon street, camera tracks sideways, coat fabric moves naturally, reflections on the pavement, cinematic short-form pacing.

uploadSlots.label: Upload reference image
uploadSlots.description: Optional image input for subject, character, product, or scene direction.

workspace.readyText: Your Hailuo video prompt and settings are ready.

showcase.title: Hailuo video prompt examples
showcase.description: Examples focus on motion clarity, camera direction, and the short-video scenes users usually want from Hailuo AI.

items.title: Fashion Walk
items.description: Character motion and cinematic street atmosphere.
items.prompt: A fashion model walks through a rainy neon street, side tracking shot, coat fabric moving naturally, reflections on wet pavement, cinematic short video.

items.title: Product Spin
items.description: High-energy product ad with controlled camera motion.
items.prompt: A tech watch floats over brushed steel, quick camera orbit, crisp highlights, clean product ad style, subtle reflections, premium commercial look.

items.title: Food Moment
items.description: Social food video with texture and movement.
items.prompt: A chef pours sauce over noodles in slow motion, close macro shot, steam rising, warm restaurant lighting, appetizing social video pacing.

items.title: Travel Clip
items.prompt: A scooter passes a coastal road at golden hour, drone-like camera glide, ocean wind, cinematic travel reel, bright natural color.

what.title: Hailuo-style short videos from text or reference images
what.description: Hailuo AI searches often center on fast image-to-video, camera movement, and short social clips. This page explains how to turn a prompt or reference image into a compact scene with visible action, not just a vague AI video.

items.title: Text-to-video ideas
items.description: Write a scene prompt with subject, action, environment, lighting, and camera movement so the clip has a clear visual job from the first second.

items.title: Image-to-video motion
items.description: Use an image as the starting reference for a product, person, character, food shot, or location when identity and composition matter more than a blank prompt.

items.title: Social-ready clips
items.description: Prepare short vertical or landscape concepts for TikTok, Reels, Shorts, product ads, creator posts, and campaign tests where motion needs to be obvious quickly.

how.title: How to use Hailuo AI video prompts
how.description: Hailuo-style results improve when the prompt describes visible motion and camera direction. The best prompts are practical: one subject, one action, one camera path, and a simple visual outcome.

steps.title: Choose text or image direction
steps.description: Start with text when you are exploring a new scene, or upload a reference image when the product, person, outfit, pose, or location should stay recognizable.

steps.title: Describe motion clearly
steps.description: Mention visible actions such as walking, turning, pouring, opening, drifting, orbiting, push-in, tilt, track, handheld move, or product rotation.

steps.title: Tune for the platform
steps.description: Review framing for the platform: vertical for Shorts and Reels, landscape for web or presentations, and square when the subject must stay centered in feeds.

features.title: Hailuo controls creators compare before generating
features.description: Competitor pages emphasize fast short clips and camera movement. Our content should add usable guidance around prompt structure, reference images, scene review, and when Hailuo-style output fits a workflow.

items.title: Text and image input
items.description: Support prompt-first exploration and image-guided generation so creators can choose between open visual ideation and asset-specific motion.

items.title: Camera direction
items.description: Prompt for tracking, tilt, orbit, push-in, handheld movement, macro reveals, or static-camera subject motion depending on what should carry the scene.

items.title: Short-form pacing
items.description: Create compact scenes where the action is readable in the opening seconds, which matters more for social hooks than long atmospheric buildup.

items.title: Prompt examples
items.description: Use practical examples for fashion, product, food, travel, lifestyle, and creator content, then replace the subject and camera direction for your asset.

useCases.title: Where Hailuo AI videos fit
useCases.description: Hailuo-style generation is strongest when a short scene has one clear action. These use cases focus on creator and marketing jobs where fast motion tests are useful before a full edit.

items.title: Product marketing
items.description: Build product reveals, rotating pack shots, ad hooks, ecommerce teasers, and commercial motion tests from existing product photos or simple prompts.

items.title: Fashion and lifestyle
items.description: Create walking shots, outfit reels, beauty clips, hand gestures, fabric movement, and lifestyle scenes where camera movement supports the subject.

items.title: Food and travel
items.description: Generate close-up food motion, steam, pouring, plating, travel openings, hotel mood clips, or destination shots with controlled camera pacing.

items.title: Creator content
items.description: Draft visual concepts before editing, captioning, publishing, or spending credits on a more complex multi-shot video workflow.

value.title: Why Hailuo AI is useful for short video
value.description: Short-form video needs motion that is obvious in the first seconds. A trustworthy Hailuo page explains how action, camera, and input assets affect whether the result feels usable.

points.title: Motion-first prompts
points.description: The best outputs start from visible action and camera language. Abstract style words help later, but they rarely fix a scene with no clear movement.

points.title: Fast creative iteration
points.description: Creators can test several camera paths, product angles, and scene ideas before committing to a final edit, campaign concept, or higher-cost generation.

points.title: Works with common assets
points.description: Product photos, character references, location images, food shots, and mood boards can guide the clip when they are clear, centered, and visually specific.

related.title: More video workflows
related.description: Move between Hailuo, Veo, Seedance, lip-sync, and Earth zoom effects depending on the motion you need.

faq.title: Hailuo AI Video Generator FAQ
faq.description: Answers to common Hailuo AI questions around text-to-video, image-to-video, prompts, output quality, and commercial use.

items.question: What is Hailuo AI Video Generator?
items.answer: Hailuo AI Video Generator is a workflow for creating short AI videos from text prompts or image references. Users describe subject motion, camera direction, lighting, and style to produce social-ready video scenes.

items.question: Can Hailuo AI create video from both text and images?
items.answer: Hailuo-style tools commonly support text-to-video and image-to-video workflows. Text prompts define the scene, while image input can guide the subject, product, character, or environment.

items.question: What prompts work best for Hailuo AI?
items.answer: The best prompts describe a single visible subject, the action, camera movement, lighting, and final composition. Clear motion words like walking, orbiting, pouring, turning, or tracking usually help more than vague style phrases.

items.question: Is Hailuo AI good for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts?
items.answer: Yes. Hailuo AI is well suited to short-form clips because it can create compact visual scenes with strong motion. Use 9:16 framing for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

items.question: Can I make product videos with Hailuo AI?
items.answer: Yes. Product photos, packaging images, and brand mood boards can guide product reveals, macro shots, camera orbits, and ad-style motion tests.

items.question: How can I reduce distorted Hailuo video results?
items.answer: Use clear prompts, avoid too many simultaneous actions, keep the subject visible, and describe one main camera movement. If using an image, choose a clean reference with good lighting and a clear subject.

items.question: Does Hailuo AI generate readable text inside video?
items.answer: Like most AI video models, generated text inside the footage can be unreliable. For logos, subtitles, captions, or exact product text, add those in an editor after generation.

items.question: Can I use Hailuo AI videos commercially?
items.answer: Commercial use depends on the service terms and the rights to your inputs. Make sure you own or can use uploaded images, likenesses, logos, product assets, music, and brand materials.

finalCta.title: Start a Hailuo AI video
finalCta.description: Upload a reference image or write a clear motion prompt, then prepare a short-form video concept with camera direction and social-ready framing.
